response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience as a full-stack engineer with 13+ years in diverse roles, including leadership positions and contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, which aligns well with the required stack and responsibilities. His expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud technologies (AWS) is evident, though his recent experience with Nest.js is less clear. His open-source contributions, education, and multilingual proficiency further strengthen his profile.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with 13+ years of experience and leadership in multiple roles.
Proven expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS, matching the primary stack requirements.
Demonstrated experience with AI-agent development and cloud infrastructure, adding value to the team.
concerns: Recent experience with Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned, which is a primary stack requirement.
Primary stack experience (React, Vitest) is not detailed in recent roles, raising questions about current proficiency.
Limited visibility on testing framework expertise (e.g., Vitest) in recent job descriptions.

key_factors.factor: Lack of explicit Nest.js experience in recent roles
